description: 1 or 3 Pairs Baby Knee High Cable Bow Socks Style: 44B853 Material: 78% Cotton, 20% Polyester, 2% Elastane Add a touch of classic charm to your little one's wardrobe with these adorable knee high cable bow baby socks. Designed for both comfort and style, they’re perfect for special occasions or everyday wear. Perfect for birthdays, family photos, or adding a darling touch to everyday outfits. 🎀 Elegant Satin Bow Detail: Each sock features a soft satin bow for a sweet, dressed-up finish. 🌺 Charming Cable Knit Texture: Classic cable pattern adds a timeless and cozy feel. ✨ Knee High Coverage: Keeps little legs warm and stylish—ideal for dresses and rompers. 🌿 Soft & Gentle Fabric: Made with baby-friendly materials that are breathable and comfortable on delicate skin. ⭐ Flexible Buying Options: Available as a single pair in cream, blue, or pink—or as a convenient 3-pack with one of each color.
